multicentralauth-desc: MultiCentralAuth - a special page that displays central authentication data from multiple sources.
centralauth-merge-method-primary-desc: The account was automatically merged based on local account being the oldest/largest.
centralauth-merge-method-new-desc: The local account was automatically created as an attached account.
centralauth-merge-method-empty-desc: The local account did not exist and was created by CentralAuth.
centralauth-merge-method-password-desc: The account was merged using a password.
centralauth-merge-method-mail-desc: The account was merged using an email confirmation.
centralauth-merge-method-admin-desc: The account was merged by an administrator.
centralauth-merge-method-login-desc: The local account was automatically created when the user logged in.
mca-manage-need-link: You need to link your Wikimedia or Miraheze accounts to manage them here.
mca-manage-error-wiki-not-found: The wiki $1 does not exist or is not reachable.
mca-manage-instructions: Use this page to manually attach other local wikis to your CentralAuth view. Select the domain and enter the subdomain of the wiki.
mca-manage-delete-help: When you select wikis and click "Delete selected", these wikis will be removed from your manually attached accounts list. This only affects your view in MultiCentralAuth on this wiki.
mca-manage-confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to remove the selected wikis from your MultiCentralAuth view?
mca-request-wm-diff-help: From the account you want to link, perform an edit on any wiki of the selected farm with content confirming ownership of the account on this wiki in English and paste the diff here.
mca-request-mh-diff-help: From the account you want to link, perform an edit on any wiki of the selected farm with content confirming ownership of the account on this wiki in English and paste the diff here.
mca-request-success: Merge request submitted successfully. Request ID: $1
mca-error-wm-required: Wikimedia username and diff link are required.
mca-error-mh-required: Miraheze username and diff link are required.
mca-log-header: This is a log of CentralAuth merge, unmerge and management actions.
mca-global-block-notice: This user has been globally blocked by $1. Expiry: $2. Reason: $3. Blocked on: $4.
